历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was approximately 3073 → 3196 → 3792 → 3220, showing a backward trend from 2021 to 2024, with a significant rebound to 3220 in 2025, an increase of about 572 places compared to 2024, and large fluctuations in the past three years. The baseline for 2025 is about 3220; the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province was 41 in 2021, 42 in 2023, 42 in 2024, and 42 in 2025; the plan for 2026 remains 42, unchanged for several consecutive years, with no direct expansion or contraction impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking: 27th in 2021 → 25th in 2022 → 26th in 2023 → 30th in 2024 → 31st in 2025 → 32nd in 2026, with a slight decline in recent years but still firmly among the top 35 in the country, with outstanding engineering strength; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation of South China University of Technology is 'significantly negative', mainly due to the campus peeping incident attracting public attention; Douyin popularity ranking is 87 (average), short video exposure is relatively low; no obvious history of admission gaps. Negative public opinion may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Food Science and Engineering A, Architecture A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, comprehensive engineering strength, highly matching with Physics Category enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other advantageous majors of South China University of Technology continue to be highly recommended in 2026; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in the province in 2026 is 110,868, estimated at about 79,936 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 72%, a slight decrease of about 0.6% compared to 80,421 in 2025, with a slight easing of competition; South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, which is an inter-provincial application for Jilin candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Jilin Province is about 0.015 (2025), belonging to a smaller source province, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the significant rebound in historical rankings in 2025, unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, a slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates in the province, negative reputation but supported by major popularity, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 3220, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 3250, and a range of 2762–3738.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2762), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) was approximately 2263 → 1437 → 1210 → 975 → 1048, showing a continuous forward trend (decreasing ranking number = intensified competition). From 2021 to 2024, the cumulative forward shift was about 1288 places, with a slight rebound of about 73 places in 2025. The 2025 baseline is approximately 1048. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jilin Province was 13 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 12 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains 12, unchanged for four consecutive years, with no direct expansion or contraction impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 32nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a slight decline in recent years but still a top national engineering university, with relatively limited appeal to liberal arts/history category students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation of South China University of Technology is 'clearly negative', mainly due to the campus peeping incident attracting public attention; Douyin popularity ranking is 87 (average). Negative public opinion may have a certain inhibitory effect on the application psychology of liberal arts/history category students. South China University of Technology's liberal arts-related discipline evaluations: Management Science and Engineering A-, Law, Economics, Journalism and Communication and other history category enrollment majors did not enter the A category, with liberal arts strength relatively weak compared to engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law category is socially recommended (relatively hot), Economics category is divided and wait-and-see, Journalism and Communication category is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in this province is 110,868, estimated at about 30,932 based on the recent history category proportion of about 28%, a slight decrease of about 0.4% compared to the 2025 history category of 31,071, with slightly eased competition. The undergraduate batch line is 369 → 384, a slight increase. South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, which is an inter-provincial application for history category candidates in Jilin Province. The university enrolls only 12 history category students in Jilin Province, a very small source, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight decrease in the total number of history category candidates in this province, negative reputation but moderate popularity of majors like Law, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly advance from the 2025 baseline of 1048. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1028, with a range of 874–1182.
